tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: General-purpose assistant for writing, summarization, code analysis, and solution discussion.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: Strong with long-context tasks, ideal for document processing and deep Q&A.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.description: Convenient integration with Google ecosystem for search, office tasks, and multimodal work.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: Search-augmented AI for quick research with source links.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-first IDE for refactoring, completion, and project-level coding assistance.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.description: High-quality image generation for covers, concept art, and visual ideation.

tips.title: Provide context before asking for output
tips.description: State goals, audience, constraints, and existing material up front to reduce model drift.

tips.title: Request structured output
tips.description: Ask for table/list/JSON formats so results are easier to copy, parse, and review.

tips.title: Ask AI to raise 3 clarifying questions first
tips.description: When requirements are fuzzy, resolve ambiguity before generation for better quality.

tips.title: Split large tasks into multiple rounds
tips.description: Generate outline first, then draft and revise section by section for higher consistency.

tips.title: Double-check critical outputs
tips.description: For code, data, or factual claims, validate with docs, tests, or reliable search.
